name: Ukuphathwa Kokulimala Okubandayo
description: Ukulawulwa kwe-frostbite, unyawo lokucwiliswa (unyawo lomsele), kanye ne-hypothermia. Ukulimala okubandayo kuyagwemeka -- qaphela izimpawu zakuqala ngaphambi kokuba umonakalo wezicubu ungalungiseki. Bamba izicubu ze-frostbitten ngobumnene kakhulu.
steps: I-HYPOTHERMIA OKOKUQALA: Hlola izinga lokushisa eliyisisekelo nge-thermometer yokufunda okuphansi. Imnene (32-35C): ukuqhaqhazela, ukudideka. Okumaphakathi (28-32C): akukho ukuthuthumela, ukudideka okukhulu. Kakhulu (<28C): uqulekile, akukho ukushaya kwenhliziyo okutholakalayo.

I-HYPOTHERMIA -- Imaphakathi/Emaphakathi: Susa izingubo ezimanzi, faka i-insulate emhlabathini, indawo efudumele, uketshezi olumnandi olufudumele uma ukwazi, amaphakethe okushisa aye ku-axillae/groin (hhayi ngqo esikhumbeni). Bamba ngobumnene -- i-jaring ingaqalisa i-VFib.

I-HYPOTHERMIA -- Inzima: Bamba ngobumnene KAKHULU. Hlola ukushaya kwenhliziyo ngamasekhondi angu-60 agcwele ngaphambi kwe-CPR. Qala i-CPR uma kungekho ukushaya kwenhliziyo. Uketshezi olufudumele lwe-IV uma lukhona. Okubalulekile kwe-MEDEVAC -- 'akufanga kuze kufudumele futhi kufe'.

I-FROSTBITE: Ikha phezulu (isikhumba esimhlophe/mpunga, esithambile ngaphansi) vs. Ukujula (okuqinile, ukuzwa kokhuni, amabhamuza). UNGAYIhlikihli indawo. UNGAFUTHI ufudumale uma ingozi yokuqandisa kabusha -- ukubanda kabusha kudala umonakalo omubi kunokulibaziseka ukufudumeza kabusha.

Ukufudumala kabusha i-FROSTBITE: Gxila emanzini angu-38-42C (angashisi kakhulu) imizuzu engu-15-30 kuze kube yilapho izicubu sezithambile futhi zibomvu/bunsomi. Kubuhlungu kakhulu -- nikeza i-analgesia (i-ketamine noma i-morphine).
Ngemva kokufudumala: iphedi phakathi kwezinzwane/iminwe ene-gauze oyinyumba. UNGAVUMI amabhamuza. Vikela ekucindezelweni.

IMMERSION FOOT (Unyawo Lomsele): ukuba manzi isikhathi eside/okubandayo, isikhumba sibomvu bese siphaphatheka bese sibe namabhamuza. Izinyawo ezomile, zifudumale kancane, ziphakamise. UNGAKUBEKI ukushisa okuqondile.
warnings: UNGAFUTHI ufudumale isithwathwa uma kukhona ithuba lokuqandisa kabusha -- ukufudumeza okungaphelele + ukuqandisa kabusha = ukulahleka kwezicubu okuyinhlekelele.
I-hypothermia enzima ingalingisa ukufa. Hlola ukushaya kwenhliziyo imizuzwana engama-60. 'Ayifanga kuze kufudumale futhi kufe.'
Utshwala bukhulisa ukulahlekelwa ukushisa naphezu kokubona imfudumalo -- ungaphuzi utshwala.
Ingozi ye-VFib iphezulu ku-hypothermia emaphakathi -- yehlisa ukukhohlisa kanye ne-jarring yesiguli.

pediatric.note: Izingane ziphola ngokushesha ngenxa yesilinganiso esiphezulu sendawo nesisindo. Izimpawu ze-Hypothermia ziyafana. Uketshezi olufudumele lwe-IV lubalulekile. Uketshezi olusekelwe isisindo: 20 mL/kg efudumele LR.

obstetric.note: I-hypothermia kamama ibangela i-fetus bradycardia kanye ne-acidosis. Ukufudumeza komama okunamandla ukwelashwa kwe-fetus. Ukuqapha kwengane uma kukhona.

source: JTS CPG: Cold Weather Injuries / PHTLS / Wilderness Medicine
